signature.cause: Hidden test fails despite perfect regression score
signature.behavior: Agent generates plausible code changes that pass existing tests but don't address root cause of issue
signature.mechanism: Incomplete understanding of problem scope; agent fixes symptom not root cause; fixes one component but misses others

clusters.symptom: Patch passes existing tests but fails hidden test; incomplete root-cause fix

signature.cause: Regression test failure (broken existing functionality) + hidden test failure
signature.behavior: Agent substitutes semantically equivalent code that breaks dependent code expecting object identity
signature.mechanism: Object semantics misunderstanding; code change preserves functional behavior but violates implicit contracts

clusters.symptom: Code change breaks previously-passing test due to semantic violation (object identity)

signature.cause: Substantially incorrect patch; low score (0.55) indicates most of fix is wrong
signature.behavior: Agent generates incorrect code (reordering blocks, wrong return values) that doesn't match problem requirements
signature.mechanism: Misinterpretation of problem domain or scope; changes made are tangential or incorrect

clusters.symptom: Substantially incorrect patch; misinterprets problem requirements

signature.cause: Agent fails to generate any patch; unable to produce valid code
signature.behavior: Agent unable to localize defect or generate valid code given problem description
signature.mechanism: Problem complexity exceeds agent's single-shot code generation capability; insufficient problem localization

clusters.symptom: Agent unable to generate any valid patch for problem

signature.cause: Hidden test fails on minimal verification set (0 regression tests)
signature.behavior: Patch applies cleanly and has minor scope, but no regression tests available to validate correctness
signature.mechanism: Insufficient verification scope; task configuration lacks baseline tests for comprehensive validation

clusters.symptom: Patch applies but insufficient baseline tests to validate correctness
